originalLayout: English source asset: title block, two-column protocol body, figure placeholder, and branded footer.
translatedLayout: Mandarin output: same master slide, locked logo, retained image positions, and text boxes auto-fit to layout bounds.

segments.source: Prepare and label each sample before beginning the procedure.
segments.translated: 在开始步骤前准备并标记每个样本。

segments.source: Record temperature, incubation time, and visible acceptance criteria.
segments.translated: Localized Mandarin segment preserving the numbered instruction and measurement terms.

segments.source: Do not translate the placeholder [Figure 1] or merge bullet levels.
segments.translated: Localized Mandarin segment with [Figure 1] preserved and bullet structure retained.

validationIssues.title: Scientific term consistency needs review
validationIssues.recommendation: Approve one glossary mapping and apply it across all assets.

validationIssues.title: Visual template preserved
